reforms.description: The government plans to increase the use of direct public support for business research and development, shifting focus from tax incentives to grants, loans, and loan guarantees. Enterprise Ireland is expanding its direct in-company research and development support to include new sectors, thereby broadening the scope of innovation assistance.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increasing direct support for R&D is expected to enhance innovation and productivity in the private sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in funding strategy for R&D, indicating a major policy change.
reforms.source_quote: Enterprise Ireland (EI) is broadening the scope of its direct in-company research, development and innovation (RDI) support for new sectors.

reforms.description: Ireland's Innovation 2020 strategy was launched to increase public investment in enterprise R&D programs, aiming to enhance support for research and development across various sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased public investment in R&D is expected to stimulate innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy has been implemented since its launch.
reforms.importance_rationale: This strategy represents a major commitment to enhancing public investment in R&D.
reforms.source_quote: Innovation 2020, Ireland’s cross Government Strategy for Research and Development, Science and Technology, was launched in December 2015.

reforms.description: The Microenterprise Loan Fund Scheme and the Strategic Banking Corporation of Ireland (SBCI) were established to provide effective financial supports to small businesses, particularly addressing market failures in access to credit.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives are designed to enhance access to finance for small businesses, fostering innovation and growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Both schemes have been implemented since their establishment.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, these reforms are narrower in scope compared to major structural changes.
reforms.source_quote: The Microenterprise Loan Fund Scheme deals more directly with firms in early stages, where market failures are most pronounced.

reforms.description: The Irish government has established 15 industry-led research centres through the Technology Centres Programme to promote collaboration between industry and public research institutions, aiming to enhance innovation activities among local firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating collaboration between industry and research institutions is expected to drive innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been implemented with established research centres.
reforms.importance_rationale: This programme represents a significant effort to enhance knowledge transfer but is not a major structural reform.
reforms.source_quote: One initiative has been the establishment of 15 industry-led research centres by Enterprise Ireland and IDA Ireland.

reforms.description: Science Foundation Ireland has established 17 research centres aimed at combining fundamental and applied research to create economic impact, partnering with industry to address strategic research questions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative aims to leverage research for economic impact, fostering innovation in key sectors.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been implemented with established research centres.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, this initiative is more focused and does not represent a major overhaul of the R&D system.
reforms.source_quote: Science Foundation Ireland has established 17 geographically dispersed research centres that are co-funded with industry partners.

reforms.description: The government introduced a new scheme in the 2018 Budget aimed at lowering the tax burden on stock options in small and medium-sized enterprises, allowing share options to be taxed only upon disposal at the capital gains tax rate.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Lowering the tax burden on stock options is expected to incentivize investment and innovation in SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: The scheme has been implemented as part of the 2018 Budget.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant but does not represent a major structural change.
reforms.source_quote: In a welcome move, the government introduced a new scheme in the 2018 Budget aimed at lowering the tax burden on stock options in small and medium sized enterprises.
